question: What color is the short-sleeved polo shirt worn by the man? A. Black B. Beige C. Salmon-colored D. Brown
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man with short brown hair wears a salmon-colored polo shirt and beige pants while standing in front of light beige curtains. He holds a thin black rod in his hands and gestures occasionally. To his left, a wooden wall clock with a hanging plant planter is mounted on the wall. A framed picture with a white mat hangs between the clock and the man.

question: How many items is the man with short brown hair holding?

Where is the wooden wall clock with a plant mounted relative to the man with short brown hair?
What action is the man wearing a salmon-colored polo shirt performing at the start of the video? A. Gesturing with hands B. Holding a cord C. Holding a cane D. Standing facing forward
Describe the sequence of actions performed by the person in the salmon shirt throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the man in the salmon shirt stands holding a cane; at 4s, the man gestures with his right hand; at 6s, the man holds a thin black cord while looking down; at 12s, the man raises hands and spreads arms outward; at 14s, the man holds a thin black rod with both hands.
